title: Brazilian Pilaf Bowl with Grilled Nectarine
description: A flavorful and refreshing Brazilian-inspired dish featuring grilled nectarine and a hearty pilaf.
instructions: 2. In a large saucepan, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add chopped onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
3. Add minced garlic and grated ginger, cooking for an additional 1-2 minutes.
4. Stir in pilaf and cook for 2-3 minutes, until lightly toasted.
5. Add chicken broth and sugar, bringing to a boil. Reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 10-12 minutes.
6. Meanwhile, grill sliced nectarine for 2-3 minutes per side, until lightly charred.
7. Fluff pilaf with a fork and stir in chopped cilantro.
8. Serve pilaf hot, topped with grilled nectarine.
